steps.t: Food can be found in the Mead Hall and kitchens throughout Snowbourn. Grain can be found in the fields directly outside town. Fastred's pendant can be…
Having gathered your portion of Fastred's gift, you should load it onto the horse he mentioned earlier. The horse can be found outside the mead-hall.
Fastred can be found in the Mead Hall of Snowbourn.
